ext.description: Custom editor for PNG / JPG / WEBP / GIF / BMP / AVIF / HEIC / SVG / ICO with EXIF metadata, camera/lens summary, GPS-to-Google-Maps, PNG iTXt/tEXt/zTXt text chunks (Korean prompts supported), and full raw EXIF dump.
config.defaultTab: Which tab the image viewer opens on first.
config.defaultTab.overview: Overview — file info, camera summary, GPS.
config.defaultTab.exif: EXIF / Segments — every IFD0/EXIF/IPTC/XMP/ICC/IHDR section as a card.
config.defaultTab.pngText: PNG Text — tEXt / zTXt / iTXt chunks (AI prompts live here).
config.defaultTab.raw: Raw JSON — the full metadata dump.
config.rawJsonExpanded: Open the Raw JSON pane expanded by default. Off = collapsed under a Show button.
config.pngTextShowAiPromptFormatted: Preserve line breaks for AI-prompt keywords (parameters, prompt, negative_prompt, workflow, comment) so Stable Diffusion / ComfyUI metadata stays readable.
